headline: Capital One Financial Corporation (COF): One of the Elite Financial Stocks According to Berkshire Hathaway
summary: We just covered the 10 Best Financial Stocks to Buy According to Warren Buffett and Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) ranks 5th on this list. Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is a relatively recent addition to the 13F portfolio of Berkshire Hathaway. The fund first disclosed a stake in the company in the first quarter […]

headline: Reliance Global Group Names CTO From Coinbase and Capital One To Lead AI-Powered Insurance Product Development and Agency Roll-Up Strategy
summary: Appointments of Zack Wilder as CTO, Judah Korman as COO, and Mordy Beyman as Executive Vice President to advance dual strategy: In-house development of planned AI-native insurance products and AI-powered agency acquisition roll-upLAKEWOOD, NJ, June 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Reliance Global Group, Inc. headline: Capital One: Totally Mispriced For Recession And Rising Defaults
summary: Capital One looks fully priced with big downside risk amid macro headwinds, rising defaults, and margin pressure. Click here to read more about COF.
